Description: Draft feature for making the tool safer for repeated runs on larger real-world trips.

Stories.StoryDescription: Save structured run manifests so users can inspect past decisions and resume later stages safely.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each run can produce a manifest describing inputs, outputs, and decisions.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add a resumable execution model so users can rerun later stages without repeating all earlier work.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The tool can resume from persisted state for later stages when appropriate.
